message:
fix(blocking): parent-child deps propagate but don't initiate blocking

A child issue is not blocked just because its parent epic has status
Open. The parent-child relationship should only propagate blocking
(if the parent is blocked by something else), not initiate it.

Fixes test_epic_does_not_block_task test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
